sectors.keyData: Exports $14.65B (2025). 38% of India's electronics exports. 23 PLI beneficiaries.
40% of India's EV production. Rs 50,000 Cr EV Policy target. 'Automobile Capital of India'.
PM-MITRA park (Rs 1,894 Cr). Tirupur carbon-negative cluster. 50% of India's mills.
Rs 12,100 Cr Taiwanese investment. 1.35 lakh jobs target. Global Nike/Adidas supplier.
Rs 1.79 lakh Cr GIM 2024 commitment. 10 GW Tata Power Solar. Green hydrogen hub.
Bulk Drug Park (Rs 2,153 Cr). Medical Devices Park (Rs 430 Cr). Biotech Park planned.
17 TIDEL Neo parks. Chennai SaaS Capital. Yotta, AdaniConneX data centers.
Semiconductor Mission 2030 (Rs 500 Cr). Coimbatore parks. Fabless Lab in Chennai.

industrialParks.name: Tata Power Renewable Energy Hub
industrialParks.notes: 10 GW solar-wind (50-50 split). 4.3 GW solar cell/module manufacturing. Largest single investment at GIM 2024.

industrialParks.name: Adani Green Energy Solar Park
industrialParks.notes: Part of Rs 42,768 Cr Adani Group investment in TN. Green energy projects.

industrialParks.name: Sembcorp Green Hydrogen Project
industrialParks.notes: Green hydrogen production at Thoothukudi port. GIM 2024 MoU.

industrialParks.name: VinFast EV Manufacturing Plant
industrialParks.notes: Vietnamese EV manufacturer. Phase 1: 150,000 EVs/year. Phase 2: eBuses, e-scooters. Operational 2025.

industrialParks.name: Tata Electronics Mobile Assembly
industrialParks.notes: Mobile phone assembly. GIM 2024 MoU. Part of iPhone supply chain.

industrialParks.name: JSW Steel Plant
industrialParks.notes: Steel manufacturing. GIM 2024 MoU. Expansion to Tirunelveli.

industrialParks.name: CPCL Petrochemical Expansion
industrialParks.notes: Refinery expansion and decarbonisation project. GIM 2024.

industrialParks.name: L&T Innovation Campus
industrialParks.notes: Innovation campus in Chennai. GIM 2024 MoU.

industrialParks.name: Saint Gobain Manufacturing Expansion
industrialParks.notes: Expansion across Kancheepuram, Tiruvallur, Erode. GIM 2024.

industrialParks.name: Ambuja Cements Expansion
industrialParks.notes: Multiple location cement plants. GIM 2024.

industrialParks.name: Foxconn iPhone Assembly Hub
industrialParks.notes: Display module assembly. Mega-campus planned. Target: 25-30M iPhones annually. $1.5B investment.

industrialParks.name: Tata Motors JLR Manufacturing Facility
industrialParks.notes: Greenfield facility inaugurated Feb 2026. 470 acres, 250,000 annual capacity. Range Rover Evoque production.

industrialParks.name: Tata Electronics iPhone Plant
industrialParks.notes: Acquired 60% stake in Pegatron. 5M iPhones annually. Doubling enclosure capacity to 100,000 units.

industrialParks.name: Hyundai Motor India Plant
industrialParks.notes: Rs 20,000 Cr over 10 years. EV battery pack assembly: 178,000 units/year. 100 EV charging stations. 250,000 indirect jobs.

industrialParks.name: Samsung Electronics Factory
industrialParks.notes: Rs 1,000 Cr expansion in 2025. New compressor plant. Produces refrigerators, TVs, washing machines. 20% of Samsung India sales.

industrialParks.name: Google Pixel & Drone Manufacturing
industrialParks.notes: Partnership with Foxconn for Pixel smartphones and Wing drones. Flagship device production.

industrialParks.name: Royal Enfield Expansion
industrialParks.notes: MoU at TN GIM 2024. New factory for EV and IC engine models. 20 lakh units capacity (up from 14.6 lakh).

industrialParks.name: Stellantis Manufacturing Hub
industrialParks.notes: Rs 2,000 Cr over 6 years. ICE/EV manufacturing. Chennai Tech Center R&D. Total India investment: Rs 11,000+ Cr.

industrialParks.name: Ashok Leyland EV & Battery Plant
industrialParks.notes: Rs 7,500 Cr for battery cell/module manufacturing, BESS, EV charging. CALB Group partnership: Rs 5,000+ Cr batteries.

industrialParks.name: Renault-Nissan Joint Venture
industrialParks.notes: $600M for 2 EV models and 4 SUVs. Export market expansion.

industrialParks.name: Daimler India Commercial Vehicles Expansion
industrialParks.notes: DICV 400-acre facility with HQ, R&D, training. Recent expansion under German investment wave 2025. Part of Rs 3,201 Cr German investment commitment.

industrialParks.name: BMW India Plant Expansion
industrialParks.notes: German investment wave 2025: Rs 3,201 Cr from German majors for R&D and EV expansion. 10 BMW models including X series.

industrialParks.name: Pegatron iPhone Assembly
industrialParks.notes: 5M iPhones annually. Tata acquired 60% stake in 2024.

industrialParks.name: Salcomp iPhone Charger Factory Expansion
industrialParks.notes: iPhone chargers, mobile power adapters. 85% women workforce. GIM 2024 expansion MoU signed. Major Apple supplier.

industrialParks.name: Qualcomm Design Center
industrialParks.notes: Semiconductor design center in Chennai. GIM 2024.

industrialParks.name: Microsoft Data Centre
industrialParks.notes: Data centre expansion. Part of $17.5B India investment for cloud and AI infrastructure. GIM 2024.

industrialParks.name: Godrej Consumer Products Plant
industrialParks.notes: FMCG manufacturing unit. GIM 2024 MoU.

industrialParks.name: Maersk Logistics Hub
industrialParks.notes: Strategic partnership with TN government. Port and logistics expansion. GIM 2024.

industrialParks.name: Ola Electric FutureFactory
industrialParks.notes: World's largest 2W EV factory. 2000 acre EV hub. 10M units/year capacity. 100 GWh battery gigafactory planned.

industrialParks.name: Ather Energy Manufacturing
industrialParks.notes: 400,000 sq ft manufacturing. Two plants: vehicle assembly + battery. 700 experience centres target by FY26.

industrialParks.name: Simple Energy FutureFactory
industrialParks.notes: 500 acre site. Phase 1: 1M units/year. Phase 2: R&D centre, testing facility, vendor park.

industrialParks.name: TVS Motor EV Plant
industrialParks.notes: Rs 1,200 Cr over 4 years for EV design, development, manufacturing. 112,949 EVs sold as of Sept 2023.

industrialParks.name: Tata Power Solar Manufacturing
industrialParks.notes: 4.3 GW solar cell and module manufacturing. India's largest single-location facility. 80% female workforce. TopCon technology.

industrialParks.name: Vikram Solar Module Plant
industrialParks.notes: 5 GW Vallam facility. 27,000 sq m automated line. TOPCon tech. Target: 17.5 GW by 2027.

industrialParks.name: Waaree Renewable Technologies
industrialParks.notes: 180 MW DC solar power plant. 10 MWh BESS. Rs 80B capex approved for 20 GWh lithium-ion storage.

industrialParks.name: Hyundai Mobis EV Battery Assembly
industrialParks.notes: EV battery system assembly. 36,000 units initially, scalable to 75,000 units.

industrialParks.name: ZF Windpower Manufacturing
industrialParks.notes: Wind power equipment manufacturing expansion. GIM 2024.

industrialParks.name: Mahindra EV R&D & Testing
industrialParks.notes: Rs 210 Cr EV battery test lab. Rs 290 Cr crash test unit at Cheyyar. Rs 196 Cr Feb 2026 expansion. SDV Centre Coimbatore.

industrialParks.name: Kaynes Technology PCB Complex
industrialParks.notes: 74-layer PCBs, HDI PCBs, flexible PCBs, high-performance laminates, camera modules.

industrialParks.name: Kaynes PCB Plant Chennai
industrialParks.notes: Advanced PCB manufacturing near Chennai.

industrialParks.name: Dixon Technologies Laptop Plant
industrialParks.notes: HP notebook manufacturing facility. Major laptop assembly plant.

industrialParks.name: Ascent Circuits PCB Facility
industrialParks.notes: Single-sided, double-sided, multi-layer, RF PCBs, flexible PCBs. 840,000 SqM annual capacity.

industrialParks.name: Syrma SGS Laptop Assembly
industrialParks.notes: MSI partnership. 100,000 laptops annually (scaling to 1M). Server motherboards (Gigabyte). FY25 revenue: Rs 3,212 Cr.

industrialParks.name: Dell Technologies Manufacturing Expansion
industrialParks.notes: Dell's biggest global manufacturing site. Exports 5 million laptops annually. Part of electronics cluster expansion 2021-2026.

industrialParks.name: PM-MITRA Mega Textile Park
industrialParks.notes: Government: Rs 1,894 Cr. Private: Rs 10,000 Cr target. 1.3M sq ft industrial space. MoU: Rs 1,200 Cr signed.

industrialParks.name: Evervan-Kothari Adidas Factory
industrialParks.notes: Adidas brand manufacturing. Target: 200M pairs by 2027. Indian-Chinese JV.

industrialParks.name: Hong Fu Footwear Manufacturing
industrialParks.notes: Taiwanese company. Nike/Adidas supplier. Two MoUs: Rs 1,000 Cr (2022) + Rs 500 Cr (2024). Start 2026.

industrialParks.name: High Glory Footwear (Pou Chen)
industrialParks.company: High Glory Footwear India Pvt Ltd (Pou Chen subsidiary)
industrialParks.notes: World's largest branded footwear manufacturer (Nike, Adidas, Asics OEM). MoU April 2023. 12-year implementation for 20,000 jobs. CM Stalin reviewed progress Dec 2025.

industrialParks.name: JR One Footwear (Crocs Manufacturing)
industrialParks.notes: Phoenix Kothari (India) + Shoe Town (Taiwan) JV. Crocs brand manufacturing.

industrialParks.name: Dean Shoes (Long Yin Investment)
industrialParks.notes: Footwear manufacturing. Part of major Taiwanese investment wave.

industrialParks.name: Mega Leather Footwear Cluster (MLFAC)
industrialParks.notes: Proximity to Ambur, Vaniyambadi, Vellore leather clusters. TN Footwear Policy 2022.

industrialParks.name: SIPCOT Integrated Textile Park
industrialParks.notes: Integrated textile park. GIM 2024.

industrialParks.name: Bulk Drug Park
industrialParks.notes: CETP, steam systems, warehousing, cold storage, R&D Centre, testing facilities.

industrialParks.name: Medical Devices Park
industrialParks.notes: Advanced medical devices infrastructure.

industrialParks.name: TIDCO Biotech Industrial Park
industrialParks.notes: Pharmaceuticals, vaccine production, biotech startups. Master plan by TIDCO.

industrialParks.name: Caplin Group Pharma Expansion
industrialParks.notes: Pharmaceutical units and R&D facility across multiple locations. GIM 2024.

industrialParks.name: Yotta Data Center Campus
industrialParks.notes: 200MW data center campus over 8-10 years. MoU with TN government.

industrialParks.name: AdaniConneX Hyperscale Data Center
industrialParks.notes: 17MW initial phase, scaling to 33MW. IGBC Platinum rated. USD 213M debt financing.

industrialParks.name: STT Global Data Centers Expansion
industrialParks.notes: USD 229M expansion. 80MW additional capacity over 5-7 years. Currently 45MW. Third campus under construction.

industrialParks.name: TIDEL Neo Park Tiruppur
industrialParks.notes: LG+G+7 floors, 65,500 sq ft. Inaugurated August 2025 by CM Stalin.

industrialParks.name: TIDEL Neo Park Salem
industrialParks.notes: G+3 structure, 55,000 sq ft. Part of 17 TIDEL Neo parks.

industrialParks.name: TIDEL Neo Park Thanjavur
industrialParks.notes: IT park in tier-2 city. Inaugurated by CM Stalin.

industrialParks.name: TIDEL Neo Park Karaikudi
industrialParks.notes: IT park in Chettinad region.

industrialParks.name: Semiconductor Manufacturing Park
industrialParks.notes: Semiconductor Mission 2030. Two parks: Sulur (100 acres) + Palladam (100 acres). Rs 500 Cr 5-year outlay. Fabless Lab in Chennai.

industrialParks.name: YES Semiconductor Equipment Facility
industrialParks.notes: Semiconductor equipment manufacturing. MoU signed. 200 jobs in first 5 years.

industrialParks.name: Foxconn AI & Advanced Manufacturing Expansion
industrialParks.notes: Largest-ever engineering jobs commitment. AI-led tech ops, value-added manufacturing, R&D integration. First 'Foxconn Desk' in India.

industrialParks.name: Indo-Taiwan Industrial Park
industrialParks.notes: Dedicated park for Taiwanese companies. Focus on electronic components, technical textiles, footwear components.

industrialParks.name: AeroDefCon 2025 - Defence Corridor Investments
industrialParks.notes: Tamil Nadu Defence Industrial Corridor. Target: Rs 75,000 Cr by 2032. Aerospace and defence manufacturing hub.

industrialParks.name: TN Rising Conclave - Coimbatore Investments
industrialParks.notes: 158 MoUs signed. Regional investment conclave Nov 2025. Western TN industrial boost.

industrialParks.name: TN Rising Conclave - Thoothukudi Investments
industrialParks.notes: 41 MoUs signed. Focus on renewable energy, shipbuilding. First TN Rising conclave Aug 2025.

industrialParks.name: High Glory (Pou Chen) Footwear Plant
industrialParks.notes: Taiwan-based Pou Chen subsidiary. Non-leather footwear manufacturing at SIPCOT Industrial Park.

industrialParks.name: CtrlS Chennai Datacenter Park
industrialParks.notes: World's tallest datacenter with 72MW IT load capacity. Two buildings with earthquake resistance up to 7.5 Richter. 230kV dedicated gas insulated substation. Indirect investment ~₹50,000 Cr expected.

industrialParks.name: Agile Robots AI Robotics Plant
industrialParks.notes: AI-driven robotics plant for automotive, consumer electronics, and healthcare industries. Founded in Munich 2018 by DLR researchers. First major manufacturing venture in India.

industrialParks.name: SOL India Air Separation Unit
industrialParks.company: SOL India Pvt Ltd (SOL SpA + SICGILSOL JV)
industrialParks.notes: Air separation unit producing cryogenic liquid oxygen, nitrogen, argon, and ultra-high purity gases. JV between Italy's SOL SpA and India's SICGILSOL. Built with €19M investment since July 2023.

industrialParks.name: BIG Tech Cover Glass Manufacturing
industrialParks.notes: India's first cover glass finishing facility using Precision Glass Processing Technology. 30M pieces capacity in Phase 1. MoU Jan 2024, foundation June 2024, inaugurated Dec 2025.

industrialParks.name: Hinduja Group EV Ecosystem
industrialParks.notes: UK-based Hinduja Group investment in cell/battery manufacturing for EVs, BESS, and EV charging stations. MoU signed Sept 6, 2025 during TN Rising Europe UK leg. Implementation via Ashok Leyland.

industrialParks.name: SIPCOT Industrial Housing - Vallam Vadagal
industrialParks.location: SIPCOT Industrial Park, Vallam Vadagal, Sriperumbudur
industrialParks.notes: India's first state-government-built hostel of this scale for a private firm. 20 acres, 18,720-bed capacity. Funded by SBI (₹490 Cr) + Central affordable housing (₹37.44 Cr). Inaugurated by CM Stalin & Foxconn Chairman Young Liu.

industrialParks.name: TP Solar 4.3 GW Solar Cell & Module Plant
industrialParks.notes: India's largest single-location solar cell & module manufacturing plant. 4.3 GW capacity. TOPCon and Mono Perc technology. 30 GW annual production. Majority women workforce.
